Name: get_department_manager
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."get_department_manager"("department_id" := $1) AS "_fn_get_department_manager" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user"."user" AS "user", "_root.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "_root.r.user.base") AS "_root.r.user" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.base"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.department" ON ('true')
